artifacts.title: Example Competitor faces class action lawsuit over data practices
artifacts.raw_text: A proposed class action lawsuit was filed against Example Competitor this week, alleging the company mishandled customer data. The complaint seeks damages and an injunction; the company said it will contest the claims.
artifacts.normalized_text: A proposed class action lawsuit was filed against Example Competitor this week, alleging the company mishandled customer data. The complaint seeks damages and an injunction; the company said it will contest the claims.

metadata.title: Example Competitor faces class action lawsuit over data practices
metadata.query: Example Competitor lawsuit OR "class action" OR settlement OR "trade secret" OR injunction

artifacts.title: Example Competitor raises $120M Series C at a higher valuation
artifacts.raw_text: Example Competitor raised $120M in a Series C round led by a growth investor, pushing its valuation higher as it expands into new markets.
